name: builder
description: Builder harness — product, design, and software in one pipeline. Instrument any project once, then run features through ALIGN → PLAN → BUILD → PROVE → REPORT.

interface.shortDescription: Request → reviewed, tested PR, with an ownership-transfer report.
interface.longDescription: Builder takes a feature or bug fix from request to a reviewed, tested pull request. It aligns before coding (a spec and plan you approve), builds in small test-first steps, proves the result actually runs, and hands you a self-contained HTML report to review — nothing ships until you say so. Instrument a project once with $builder-setup-harness, then run work through $builder-feature.
defaultPrompt: Set up the builder harness for this project.
Build this feature with the builder pipeline.
